articles.headline: Lineker, Shearer, Owen, Rooney, Kane - is England's near half-century of world-class strikers about to end?
articles.description: With an elite striker having worn the Three Lions on their chest for 42 years, England have taken the position for granted - but is Harry Kane the last?

images.name:
Lineker-Shearer-Rooney-Kane
 [1296x729]
images.caption: England are arguably the best country in the world at producing great strikers.

images.name:
Harry Kane of England runs with the ball during a training session at Tottenham Hotspur Training Centre
 [1296x729]
images.caption: The identity of Harry Kane's successor for England remains unknown.
images.alt: Harry Kane of England runs with the ball during a training session at Tottenham Hotspur Training Centre
images.credit: Eddie Keogh - The FA/The FA via Getty Images

images.name:
France's forward Kylian Mbappe (L) and France's forward Karim Benzema (R) celebrate with the trophy at the end of the Nations League final football match between Spain and France at San Siro stadium
 [1296x729]
images.caption: France have a history of producing great forwards such as Karim Benzema and Kylian Mbappé.
images.alt: France's forward Kylian Mbappe (L) and France's forward Karim Benzema (R) celebrate with the trophy at the end of the Nations League final football match between Spain and France at San Siro stadium

images.name:
Liam Delap of Chelsea receives medical treatment and is substituted off the pitch injured during the Premier League match between Chelsea and Fulham at Stamford Bridge
 [1296x729]
images.caption: Liam Delap has endured a disappointing, injury-hit first season at Chelsea.
images.alt: Liam Delap of Chelsea receives medical treatment and is substituted off the pitch injured during the Premier League match between Chelsea and Fulham at Stamford Bridge

images.name:
Harry Kane of England celebrates scoring his team's second goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 qualifier match between Albania and England at Air Albania Stadium
 [1296x729]
images.caption: Harry Kane is England's all-time top goalscorer.
images.alt: Harry Kane of England celebrates scoring his team's second goal during the FIFA World Cup 2026 qualifier match between Albania and England at Air Albania Stadium
images.credit: Michael Regan - The FA/The FA via Getty Images

images.name:
Alexander Isak of Newcastle United and Erling Haaland of Manchester City keep their eyes on the ball during the Premier League match between Manchester City FC and Newcastle United FC at Etihad Stadium
 [1296x729]
images.caption: Recognised strikers Erling Haaland and Alexander Isak are two of the Premier League's most coveted players.
images.alt: Alexander Isak of Newcastle United and Erling Haaland of Manchester City keep their eyes on the ball during the Premier League match between Manchester City FC and Newcastle United FC at Etihad Stadium

articles.headline: World Cup 2026: Can Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo finally meet on biggest stage?
articles.description: In a sixth World Cup for Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo, could the pair finally face each other in the tournament?

images.caption: Will Messi and Ronaldo finally face off in a World Cup match?
images.alt: Will Messi and Ronaldo finally face off in a World Cup match?

images.credit: Michael Regan - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images

images.name: Cristiano Ronaldo of Portugal photographers Nov28-2022 [608x342]
The Ultimate Messi vs Ronaldo You Have To Answer
images.caption: Stars from the football world and beyond have their say on the Lionel Messi or Cristiano Ronaldo debate in ESPN FC's You Have To Answer challenge!

article.headline: Panama out of World Cup after loss to Croatia
article.description: Josip Stanisic lifted a curving cross onto the boot of Ante Budimir, who tapped it into an open net in the 54th minute Tuesday, giving Croatia a 1-0 win over Panama in the FIFA World Cup.
article.linkText: Panama out of World Cup after loss to Croatia

article.story:
TORONTO -- Josip Stanisic lifted a curving cross onto the boot of Ante Budimir, who tapped it into an open net in the 54th minute Tuesday, giving Croatia a 1-0 win over Panama in the FIFA World Cup.

Croatia remains in contention for the knockout round ahead of their third and final group-stage match against Ghana on Saturday. Panama were eliminated and are still seeking a first World Cup point in two appearances.

After a slow-moving first half at BMO Field, Croatia broke through Panama's strong back line after the break, with substitute Budimir finding the net just four minutes after coming on.

The Vatreni nearly added another goal three minutes later when 40-year-old Luka Modrić -- making his 200th international appearance -- passed ahead to Marco Pašalić on a breakaway, but Panama goalkeeper Orlando Mosquera blocked Pašalić's shot.

Panama had three straight chances in the 67th minute to knot things up. Croatia goalkeeper Dominik Livaković made a trio of dazzling saves; on the third, he just managed to get a hand on the ball and send it over the net.

Group L will be decided on Saturday, with England and Ghana tied at four points and Croatia with three.

England will face Los Canaleros in East Rutherford, New Jersey, while Ghana and Croatia will play in Philadelphia.

stats.name: aerialsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: aerialsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: finalThirdEntries
stats.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside the final third into the final third

stats.name: penAreaEntries
stats.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside to inside the penalty area

stats.name: progressiveCarries
stats.description: Carries that significantly move the ball toward the opponent’s goal

stats.name: successfulFinalThirdPasses
stats.description: Total number of successful passes where the ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

stats.name: totalFinalThirdPasses
stats.description: Total number of passes (successful or unsuccessful) where ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

stats.name: touchesInOppBox
stats.description: Total touches inside the penalty area of the opposition

stats.name: blockedShots
stats.description: The number shots blocked by a defender.

stats.name: effectiveClearance
stats.description: The number of clearances that stops the attack of the opposing team.

stats.name: effectiveTackles
stats.description: The number of tackles where the player wins the ball.

stats.name: inneffectiveTackles
stats.description: The number of tackles where the player doesn't win the ball.

stats.name: interceptions
stats.description: The number of interceptions.

stats.name: tacklePct
stats.description: The perencentage of tackles where the player wins the ball.

stats.name: totalClearance
stats.description: The number of clearances attempted.

stats.name: totalTackles
stats.description: The number of tackles attempted.

stats.name: possWonAtt3rd
stats.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the attacking third of the field

stats.name: possWonDef3rd
stats.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the defensive third of the field

stats.name: possWonMid3rd
stats.description: Total number of times possession was regained in the midfield third of the field

stats.name: ballRecovery
stats.description: When a player takes possession of a loose ball, or switch of possession between teams when the ball is in open play

stats.name: timesTackled
stats.description: The total number of times a player has been tackled.

stats.name: defensiveInterventions
stats.description: The sum of ball recoveries, won tackles, effective clearances, outfielder blocks, blocked crosses, and defensive third duels won.

stats.name: appearances
stats.description: The number of times a player has made an appearance in a match.

stats.description: The average user rating for a player.

stats.name: dnp
stats.description: The number of times a player did not play in a match.

stats.name: foulsCommitted

stats.name: aerialsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: aerialsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: touches
stats.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

stats.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

stats.description: The number of times a team has lost a match.

stats.description: The number of minutes played by a player.

stats.name: ownGoals
stats.description: The number of own goals conceded.

stats.description: The number of starts a player has made in matches.

stats.description: The percentage of matches won.

stats.name: aerialsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: aerialsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: touches
stats.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

stats.name: aerialDuelPct
stats.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

stats.name: aerialsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.description: The difference of goals scored and goals conceded.

stats.description: The number of handball fouls committed..

stats.description: The number of yellow cards accumulated.

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.
